pattern: DP where dp[i] = minimum partitions for s[0..i-1]; for each end position check all possible last segments and test balance in O(26) per extension.
hints: Define dp[i] = minimum number of balanced substrings to partition s[0..i-1]. Initialize dp[0]=0 and compute dp[i] by checking all starting positions j < i.
For a segment s[j..i-1] to be balanced, every character that appears must appear the same number of times. Maintain a frequency map and a count-of-counts as you extend j leftward from i.

s[j..i-1] is balanced iff the number of distinct characters times the uniform frequency equals (i-j): len * freq == i-j, and there is only one distinct frequency value. Use dp[j]+1 as candidate for dp[i].

edge_inputs.description: aab is not balanced - a appears twice b once
whole string balanced in one part

stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = rng.randint(1, size)
    s = ''.join(rng.choice('abcde') for _ in range(n))
    return [s]
